meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Goldfish
products.tagline: Press Option. It knows your work and replies like you
products.summaryZh: 按下 Option 键。它了解你的工作，并以你的风格回应。
products.descriptionZh: 大多数AI工具需要你先解释上下文才能提供帮助。Goldfish已经掌握了这些信息。它能私密地记住你在Mac上的工作内容，并在任何应用中帮你写出更好的文字。在文本框中按下Option键，即可起草回复、总结讨论串、改写句子，或从近期工作中回忆重要细节，无需复制粘贴，也无需重新解释来龙去脉。
products.description: Most AI tools make you explain the context before they can help. Goldfish already has it. It privately remembers what you’ve been working on across your Mac, then helps you write better from any app. Press Option in a text field to draft replies, summarize threads, rewrite sentences, or recall important details from your recent work without copying, pasting, or re-explaining the whole backstory.

products.name: Invoko
products.tagline: A little hand on your Mac
products.summaryZh: Mac 上的小帮手
products.descriptionZh: Invoko 是一款可在工作时对话的AI桌面助手。将其置于屏幕任意内容旁侧，即可提问或交由它跨应用处理任务。
products.description: Invoko is an AI desktop helper you can talk to while you work. Bring it beside anything on your screen, ask it questions, or let it handle tasks across your apps.

products.name: MakersClaw
products.tagline: Hire AI employees that live in your Slack, Teams, Telegram
products.summaryZh: 在 Slack、Teams、Telegram 中雇佣 AI 员工
products.descriptionZh: 雇佣全天候运行的AI员工，每个AI拥有独立容器和专属记忆。一键接入Slack、Telegram或Teams。预置支持客服、销售、调研、SEO等场景，也可自行编写任意功能。按工具调用次数付费。
products.description: Hire AI employees that run 24/7 in their own container with their own memory. One-click into your Slack, Telegram, or Teams. Pre-built for support, sales, research, SEO, or anything you write yourself. Pay per call for the tools they use.

products.name: Edgee Turbo Models
products.tagline: Use Claude Code with Kimi K2.7 Code, MiniMax M2.7, and more
products.summaryZh: 使用Claude Code配合Kimi K2.7 Code、MiniMax M2.7等模型
products.descriptionZh: 在 Claude Code 中运行最先进的开源模型（GLM 5.1、Kimi K2.7 Code、MiniMax M2.7 等），速度提升最高达 4 倍（最高 200 tok/s），固定月费 29 美元。数分钟内即可完成设置，无需修改代码。
products.description: Run state-of-the-art open-source models (GLM 5.1, Kimi K2.7 Code, MiniMax M2.7, and more) in Claude Code at up to 4× the speed (up to 200 tok/s) for a flat $29/month. Set up in minutes, no code changes.

products.name: Zoona AI
products.tagline: Automated support that learns from docs + past conversations
products.summaryZh: 基于文档与历史对话自动学习的支持系统
products.descriptionZh: 迟缓、臃肿的旧式支持工具已经过时。Zoona是为现代团队打造的支持工具——它能从你的文档和过往对话中学习，在工单提交的瞬间解决60%以上的问题。没有积压，没有倦怠，无需为应对需求而不断招人。当确实需要人工介入时，它会带着完整上下文进行交接，客户无需重复说明。这才是与你一同成长、而非对抗的支持方案。训练它，上线，完成。
products.description: Sluggish, bloated, legacy support tools are dead. Zoona is support for modern teams — it learns from your docs and past conversations, then resolves 60%+ of tickets the second they land. No backlog. No burnout. No endless hiring to keep up. When it does need a human, it hands off with full context so the customer never repeats themselves. This is support that scales with you, not against you. Train it, go live, done.

products.name: GitHits beta 0.9
products.tagline: Give your AI coding agent access to open-source code
products.summaryZh: 为你的AI编程助手提供开源代码访问权限
products.descriptionZh: GitHits 让编码代理能够访问你的应用所依赖的开源代码。获取真实的实现示例、依赖源码导航、包检查和文档。代理可以搜索和读取你的代码库，但无法搜索和读取你的应用所依赖的开源代码。这正是它们开始猜测、重试和循环的地方。GitHits 按需构建版本感知索引。代理可以搜索、导航和检查依赖背后的代码。CLI：npx githits@latest init
products.description: GitHits gives coding agents access to the open-source code your app depends on. Get real implementation examples, dependency source navigation, package inspection and documentation. Agents can grep and read your codebase. They can't grep and read the open-source code your app depends on. That's where they start guessing, retrying, and looping. GitHits builds a version-aware index on demand. Agents can search, navigate, and inspect the code behind their dependencies. CLI: npx githits@latest init

products.name: Stride
products.tagline: The AI workspace that plans, designs and ships with you.
products.summaryZh: AI工作空间，与你一同规划、设计并交付。
products.descriptionZh: Stride 是面向完整开发流程的 AI 原生工作空间：规划、设计、验证与交付。其 AI 基于真实项目数据运行，并通过 MCP 接入 Claude Code 和 Codex，从而直接执行任务而非空谈。你的团队无需切换工具，即可从创意直达发布。
products.description: Stride is the AI-native workspace for the whole build: plan, design, verify, and ship. Its AI works inside your real project data and plugs into Claude Code and Codex over MCP, so it does the work instead of just talking about it. Your team goes from idea to launch without switching tools.

products.name: MindReader v1
products.tagline: Read minds (simulated fMRI data, channeled to neuro-metrics)
products.summaryZh: 读取思维（模拟fMRI数据，转化为神经指标）
products.descriptionZh: 你感觉如何？这是艺术中最古老的问题，也是技术中最新能回答的问题。MindReader 读取你的内容，并逐区域模拟大脑对其的反应。完全开源——我们鼓励你动手探索。与 madhat 创始人一起进行销售评估、数据集神经评估及其他深奥的产品实验。MindReader 基于 Meta FAIR 的 TRIBE v2 及 35 年神经科学研究构建。诚邀学术界等各方合作。
products.description: How do you feel? It is the oldest question in art and the newest one we can answer in technology. MindReader takes your content and simulates, region by region, how a brain responds to it. Completely Open Source - we encourage you to tinker. Exploring sales evals, neural evals for datasets and other esoteric product experiments w/ madhat founders. MindReader is built on Meta FAIR's TRIBE v2 + 35yrs of neuro research. Inviting collab from the academics et all.

products.name: Dirac
products.tagline: The AI inbox that briefs founders every morning
products.summaryZh: AI收件箱，每日为创始人提供简报
products.descriptionZh: 创始人每天花费数小时处理邮件，而这些时间本应用于构建和推进实际进展。Dirac正是为此而生。Dirac是一款原生AI收件箱，它能扫描你的邮件线程，以你的口吻草拟回复，并仅呈现需要你决策的摘要，同时在后台静默处理80%的非重要邮件。你通过决策来管理收件箱，而非充当自己的助理。
products.description: Founders lose hours everyday to doing email, when they should be spending the time to build and make real progress. Dirac was made to end that. Dirac is an AI-native inbox that scans your threads, drafts replies in your voice, and shows a brief with only what needs your decision, quietly dealing with the 80% of un-important emails in the background. You run your inbox by deciding, not being your own assitant.

products.name: Revyl
products.tagline: The mobile source of truth
products.summaryZh: 移动端事实来源
products.descriptionZh: Revyl 为移动团队提供完整的可观测性，使其能够了解应用在真实云设备上的实际行为。包括逐步骤执行追踪、性能数据（CPU、内存、FPS）、完整的网络瀑布图，以及每次运行中的状态和文件系统差异对比。Atlas 自动映射应用中的每个屏幕和流程，而 revyl dev 则将热重载和设备控制集成到开发循环中。
products.description: Revyl gives mobile teams full observability into how their app actually behaves on live cloud devices. Step-level execution traces, performance data (CPU, memory, FPS), a complete network waterfall, and state and file-system diffing across every run. Atlas auto-maps every screen and flow in your app, and revyl dev brings hot reload and device control into your dev loop.

products.name: DevCleaner
products.tagline: Free the gigabytes your dev tools and AI apps hoard
products.summaryZh: 释放你的开发工具和AI应用囤积的千兆字节
products.descriptionZh: DevCleaner 驻留在 Mac 菜单栏中，可释放 22 个开发环境悄然占用的 GB 级空间——包括 Xcode、Gradle、npm，以及 Cursor、Claude 和 Ollama 等 AI 应用。每个项目均标注风险等级，让你始终清楚哪些内容可安全删除。免费使用，无需账户，仅 4 MB。
products.description: DevCleaner lives in your Mac's menu bar and frees the gigabytes that 22 dev ecosystems quietly hoard — Xcode, Gradle, npm, plus AI apps like Cursor, Claude & Ollama. Every item is risk-rated, so you always know what's safe to delete. Free, no account, 4 MB.

products.name: Vidrunner
products.tagline: Publish YouTube videos faster with AI
products.summaryZh: 使用AI加速YouTube视频发布
products.descriptionZh: 从任意视频生成准确的YouTube时间戳、关键词丰富的标签和亚马逊产品链接。粘贴网址，选择所需内容，复制粘贴到YouTube。免费开始使用。
products.description: Generate accurate YouTube timestamps, keyword-rich tags, and Amazon product links from any video. Paste a URL, pick what you need, copy and paste into YouTube. Start free.

products.name: Glint
products.tagline: Claude Code activity, right where you want it.
products.summaryZh: Claude Code 活动，尽在掌握。
products.descriptionZh: Glint 是一款轻量级 macOS 菜单栏应用，可在刘海屏附近的 glanceable 岛、浮动药丸或 Dock 旁，直观展示你的 Claude Code 会话状态——包括实时状态、当前工具、Token 消耗、计划、子代理、使用量计量器及上下文窗口。它本地读取 ~/.claude 文件，你的会话数据不会离开 Mac。对 Codex、Kiro 等其他提供商的支持已在路线图中，将尽快发布。
products.description: Glint is a lightweight macOS menu-bar app that surfaces what your Claude Code sessions are doing - live status, the current tool, token spend, the plan, subagents, usage meters, and context window - in a glanceable island near your notch, a floating pill, or beside the Dock. Reads ~/.claude locally; your session data never leaves your Mac. Support for other providers like Codex, Kiro and etc are on the roadmap to be release ASAP!

products.name: Tadka
products.tagline: Ship 10x more ad creative, without hiring a design team.
products.summaryZh: 广告创意产出提升10倍，无需组建设计团队。
products.descriptionZh: Tadka 能在几分钟内将一份简报转化为数百个符合品牌调性、贴合受众的广告创意，并自动识别哪些效果最佳。这正是你的 Meta 和 Google 广告系列所亟需的创意数量。
products.description: Tadka turns one brief into hundreds of on-brand, audience-tuned ad creatives in minutes, then learns which ones win. The creative volume your Meta and Google campaigns are starving for.

products.name: agentbrowse
products.tagline: Give your AI coding agent the web as a command line
products.summaryZh: 让你的AI编程助手将整个网络视为命令行。
products.descriptionZh: AI编程代理在终端中表现出色，但在浏览器中却显得笨拙。agentbrowse能将任何网站转化为CLI界面，供其驱动——可打开、截图、点击、填写、以干净Markdown格式读取，甚至登录。一条命令即可让Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、Gemini和Windsurf默认使用它。
products.description: AI coding agents are great in a terminal and clumsy in a browser. agentbrowse turns any website into a CLI they drive it can open, snapshot, click, fill, read as clean markdown, even log in. One command makes Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini & Windsurf use it by default.

products.name: ClientJam
products.tagline: AI-powered lead generation for designers and agencies
products.summaryZh: 面向设计师与设计机构的人工智能驱动线索生成
products.descriptionZh: 大多数线索生成工具只告诉你企业是谁。ClientJam 则告诉你他们有多需要你——然后帮你撰写提案。粘贴任意网址，即可获得一份通俗易懂的审计报告（SSL、移动端、速度、SEO）、一个按成熟度排序的机会评分，以及基于网站真实缺陷生成的3封可直接发送的邮件。City Prospector 可从全球任意城市提取20条线索。任何人都能列出联系人——ClientJam 则通过真实审计评估意图，并撰写外联内容。这就是名单与预约通话之间的差距。
products.description: Most lead generation apps tell you who a business is. ClientJam tells you how badly they need you — then writes the pitch. Paste any URL for a plain-English audit (SSL, mobile, speed, SEO), an opportunity score ranking leads by ripeness, and 3 ready-to-send emails built from the site's real flaws. City Prospector pulls 20 leads from any city worldwide. Anyone can list contacts — ClientJam scores intent from a real audit and writes the outreach. The gap between a list and a booked call.

products.name: PeakRoutine
products.tagline: Personalized health coaching powered by your biomarkers
products.summaryZh: 基于您的生物标志物驱动的个性化健康指导
products.descriptionZh: PeakRoutine 将你的睡眠、日照、运动、热量、营养、情绪、水分摄入等数据相互关联分析，然后精确告诉你这些数据对你身体的意义。没有千篇一律的计划，只有一个主动学习你生理特征并据此构建习惯的AI教练。
products.description: PeakRoutine connects your sleep, sunlight, exercise, calories, nutrition, mood, hydration, and more — correlates them against each other — then tells you exactly what it means for your body. No generic plans. Just a proactive AI coach that learns your biology and builds habits around it.

products.name: Voice Calls in Chatwoot
products.tagline: Calls, chats, and emails all in one support inbox
products.summaryZh: 支持收件箱整合通话、聊天和邮件。
products.descriptionZh: Chatwoot Voice 提供支持团队处理客户通话所需的一切功能，无需离开收件箱即可完成：基于浏览器的通话、呼入和呼出电话支持、Twilio Voice 集成、WhatsApp 通话支持、通话录音、转录、AI 摘要、通话历史记录以及同一对话线程中的客户上下文信息。
products.description: Chatwoot Voice has everything your support team needs to handle customer calls without leaving the inbox: browser-based calling, inbound and outbound phone support, Twilio Voice integration, WhatsApp calling support, call recordings, transcripts, AI summaries, call history, and customer context in one conversation thread.

products.name: Kraina
products.tagline: Turn your outdoor activities into a territory game.
products.summaryZh: 将你的户外活动变成一场领地游戏。
products.descriptionZh: Kraina将户外运动转化为一张活的地域地图。与仅显示狭窄路线走廊的常规应用不同，Kraina让你绘制环形路线，从而揭示土地内部。地图是动态的：借助滚动迷雾功能，你不再造访的地方会逐渐淡出，这为你重返并重新占领领地提供了理由。通过任务和挑战区域，带着目标去探索。现已登陆Web和iPhone。
products.description: Kraina turns outdoor movement into a living territory map. Unlike standard apps that show thin route corridors, Kraina lets you draw loops to reveal the land inside. The map is alive: with Rolling Fog, places you stop visiting can fade back, giving you a reason to return and reclaim your territory. Explore with purpose through missions and challenge zones. Now on Web and iPhone.

products.name: Subotiz
products.tagline: Smarter Monetization. Subscribe. Sell. Scale.
products.summaryZh: 更智能的变现。订阅。销售。规模化。
products.descriptionZh: 专为AI和SaaS打造的订阅增长引擎。支持T+7提前收款、原生代币计量，并内置全球税务合规功能。
products.description: The Subscription Growth Engine built for AI and SaaS. Get paid as early as T+7, native token metering, and global tax compliance out-of-the-box.
